remarks: Bright Sun-filled 3BR/3BTH, Corner unit in desirable Down Town Stamford high-rise Building.  Spacious 1,680 SF layout with open living and dining areas w abundant natural light. Two private balconies offer views of Long Island Sound & Sun Set views w Stamford skyline. Large primary suite with walk-in closet & In-Suite bath. Common charges include Heat, Hot Water, Cooking Gas, Grounds Maintenance, Trash Pickup, Snow Removal, City Water, City Sewer, Property Management, Road Maintenance, Insurance, One Assigned Garage Parking Space & Full Building Amenities: Front desk Reception, Live-in Superintendent, Party Room, Fitness Center, Pest Control Svc., Pool & Secure lower-level Storage.  Additional outdoor parking is available for $80 per month. Ten Guest Parking Spaces available for building residents guests and more on the weekends. Laundry Machines, Recycle bin & Garbage shoot on Each Floor.  Convenient walk-to-downtown location with CT Transit at the front door. Comfortable full-service in-town living.  5 Minutes Drive to I95 & Metro North train station going to New York & New Haven. Walking Distance to Down Town, Restaurants, Shopping Mall, Library, Theaters & Mill River park. Free Trolly to Harbor Point & Easy access to Cove Beach, Cummings Beach & Scalzi Park. Conventional mortgages are not available. Drive way under renovation. CASH OFFER ONLY.
